titleStmt.title: SII 26.493: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 493. (A.R. No. 469 of 1909.) ĀḺVĀR-TIRUNAGARI, TIRUCHENDUR TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pūmalar tiruvum, etc., and mentions the queen Ulagamuḻuduḍaiyāḷ. It also states that the king was seated on the couch called Maḻavarāyaṉ in the bed-room in the palace at Māḍakkuḷakkīḻ Madurai.

It states that a certain Araiyaṉ Pūvaṉ alias Veṇāvuḍaiyāṉ instituted a worship called Tirunāḍuḍaiyāṉ-sandhi after Araiyaṉ Tirunāḍuḍaiyāṉ alias Nīlagaṅgaraiyaṉ of Kīḻaikkoḍumaḷūr alias Madurōdayanallūr in Vaḍatalaichchembi-nāḍu, to the god Paramasvāmi of the temple of Poliñjuniṉṟaruḷiṉa Paramasvāmigaḷ of Tirukkurugūr in Tiruvaḷudi-vaḷanāḍu, besides instituting a 15-day festival in the month of Chittirai to celebrate the Uttiraṭṭādi which was his birth asterism. In order to provide for offerings at these functions, land, 4-1/2 vēli in extent, in Peruṅguḷam alias Uttamadānanallūr, was given as dēvadāna by this Vēṇāvuḍaiyār to the temple of the god Paramasvāmigal and that as per the request of Ayyaṉ Maḻavarāyan, the king made it a kārāṇmai mīyāṭchi dēvadāna from the 11+1st year of his reign. It is stated that Vēṇāvuḍaiyāṉ had given half a vēli of land in Peruṅguḷam as danmadāna to a certain Tiruveḷḷaṟainiṉṟa Vādippirāṉ Vaṇḍuvaraiperumāḷ alias Sundarapāṇḍya Brahmādhirāyaṉ.
The signatories were Ūyaniṉṟāḍu Vāṉavar Sōmadēvaṉ alias Tirunilattaraiyaṉ of Taḍaṅkaṇṇi Śiṟṟūr in Tīrumallināḍu and Araiyaṉ Viratamuḍittāṉ alias Pallavarāyaṉ of Chakkarapāṇinallūr in Śēvirukkai-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmalar tiruvum poruḷ cayamaṭantaiyum tāmaraik kuvimulai jayappuyattiruppa
vetanāvil veḷḷitaṭṭāmarai kātalar mātu kaviṉpeṟa taḷaippa veṇṭiraiyuṭutta ma
ṇṭiṇi kiṭakkat tirunilamaṭantai yurimaiyiṟ kaḷippac camaiyamu nitiyun tarumamun taḻaippa
Imaiyavar viḻākkoṭi Iṭantoṟu yeṭuppak karuṅkali kaṉal keṭak kaṭavuḷ vetiyar Arun
toḻil veḻvicceṅkaṉal vaḷaṟppac curitiyun tamiḻun tol vaḷaṅkulavap poru tiṟalāḻi pūta
lañcūḻavar Oru kaiyirucevi mummataṉāṟ koṭṭayirāpatamutal ceytarakoṟṟatteṇṭiraiyāṉai E
ruttu meṟi kaṇṭa nāṭemateṉa kayal kaḻikūṟa kocalan tuḷuvaṅ kukiraṅ kuccaram pocala makatam poppaḷaṅ
kaliṅkamiḻuṅ kaṭāraṅ kauṭam puṇṭaran toliṅkañ coṉakañ ciṉamutalāya viti muṟai tikaḻa vevveṟu vaku
tta mutunilakkiḻamaiyil muṭipuṉai ventaṟkoru taṉināyaka ṉeṉṟulakaketta tirumuṭi cūṭi ceṅkolocci koṟṟat
taraḷa kuḷirkuṭai niḻaṟ kiḻ kaṟṟaṟekkavari kāvalar vica viṭaikatir naṟumaṇi vira- siṅhāsaṉattu maṇimuṭicūṭi Uyar(ku)
kulat tiruveṉa paṅkaiyar malaṟkaraṅkuvittup pāttivar maṅkaiyar tiraṇṭu vaṇaṅkuñ ceṉṉi cuṭaroḷi mau
li cuṭarmaṇi meliṭaccivanta Iṇaimalaṟ ciṟaṭi matukaraṅ kamalameṉṟaṇukum Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟi
runtaruḷiya māmutal matikkulam viḷakkiya komutaṟ komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇ
ṭiyatevaṟkku 10 1 nāḷ nāṉūṟṟu Ampattu nāliṉāl māṭakkuḷak kiḻ maturaikkoyiṟ paḷḷiyaṟaik kūṭattu
ppaḷḷippiṭa maḻavarāyaṉil Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu tiruveḻuti vaḷanāṭṭu tirukkurukūr poliñcu niṉṟaruḷiṉa pa
ramasvāmikaḷ koyil tiruppati civaiṣṇavar ceyya tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Ipparamasvāmikaḷukku vaṭatalaic cem
pi nāṭṭukkiḻaik koṭumaḷūrāṉ Araiyaṉ tirunāṭuṭaiyāṉāṉa nilakaṅkaraiyaṉ perāl Araiyaṉ pūvaṉāṉa veṇāvu
ṭaiyāṉ kaṇṭa tirunāṭuṭaiyāṉ cantikku tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu nimantaṅkaḷukkum Iveṇāvuṭaiyāṉ
piṟanta Uttiraṭṭātināḷ tiṟtam prasātippatāka kaṇṭa cittirait tirunāḷ patiṉaiñcukkum tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭ
ṭu veṇṭu nimantaṅkaḷukkum tirunāḷpaṭikkum peruṅkuḷamāṉa Uttamapāṇṭiyanallūril Ipparamasvāmikaḷ ku
tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy Ivveṇāṭuṭaiyāṉ nilam Añcu veliyil tiruveḷḷaṟai niṉṟa vātippirāṉ vaṇṭuva
raipperumāḷāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya brahmātarāyaṉukku Ivveṇāvuṭaiyār kārāṇmai taṉmatāṉamāka kuṭutta nilam Arai
yu nikki nilam nālaraiyum muṉṉuṭaiyārait tavirttup patiṉoṟāvatiṉetirāmāṇṭu mutal kārāṇmai miyācci tevatāṉa
Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu Aiyyaṉ maḻavarāyaṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippoliñcu niṉṟaruḷiya paramasvāmikaḷukku
vaṭatalaiccempi nāṭṭukiḻaikkoṭumaḷūrāṉa maturotaiyanallūr Araiyaṉ tirunāḷuṭaiyāṉāṉa nilakaṅkaraiyaṉ perā
l Araiyaṉ pūvaṉāṉa veṇāvuṭaiyāṉkaṇṭa tirunāṭuṭaiyāṉ cantikkum tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu nimantaṅkaḷukku
m veṇāvuṭaiyāṉ piṟanta Uttiraṭṭātināḷ tiṟttam prasātippatāka kaṇṭa cittiraittirunāḷ 10 5 kkum tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭa veṇ
ṭum nimantaṅkaḷukkum tirunāḷpaṭikkum peruṅkuḷamāṉa Uttamapāṇṭiyanallūril Ipparamasvāmikaḷukkum tevatāṉa Iṟai
yiliyāy Ivveṇāvuṭaiyāṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilam Añcuveliyil tiruveḷḷaṟai niṉṟa vātippirāṉ vaṇṭu varaip perumāḷāṉa cu
ṉtirapāṇṭiya brahmātharāyaṉukku Ivveṇāvuṭaiyār kārāṇmai taṉmatāṉamāka kuṭuttanilam Araiyum nikki nikki nilam nāla
raiyum muṉṉuṭaiyārait tavirttu Ivvāṇṭumutal kaārāṇmai miyācci devatāṉamāka Iṭṭu variyilār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvari
yum nam Olaiyun taraccoṉṉom kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭivittuk koḷ
ḷaveṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai tirumallināṭṭu taṭaṅkaṇṇi ciṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ Ūyaniṉṟāṭu vāṉavar comatevaṉā
ṉa tirunilattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cevirukkai nāṭṭu cakkarapāṇinallūr Araiyaṉ viratamuṭittāṉāṉa pallavarāyaṉ
Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.493 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
